subcodes.title: Tablet of the Divine Plan (Southern states I)
subcodes.first_line: O ye heralds of the Kingdom of God! A few days ago an epistle was written
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادیان بملکوت الله چند روز پیش بان یاران الهی نامه نگاشته گشت ولی چون این
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
